title: Synthetic Tactus smoke test: update README.md note
description:
Synthetic safe task for Kanbus/Tactus orchestration smoke testing in run-codeql.

Required behavior:
- Update README.md only.
- Add one short sentence noting this file was touched by a Kanbus/Tactus orchestration smoke test.
- Do not change production code, dependency files, lockfiles, generated artifacts, project/issues, project/events, or project/runs.
- Do not run git add, git commit, git push, gh, or Kanbus mutation commands from the worker; Kanbus orchestration owns validation and publication.
- Keep the change intentionally trivial and documentation-only.
